finding: External-MCP elicitation forwards the untrusted requestedSchema verbatim (cap_requested_schema only size-checks, never strips keys); an external server can set x-ziee-askuser:true itself, so the FE renders the ziee-internal RICH decision UX for untrusted content, forging the internal-only marker and violating the external-must-stay-flat boundary.

Second untrusted ingress: the persisted elicitation content stores the external-server requested_schema unmodified, so a forged x-ziee-askuser survives reload and re-enters rich mode after refetch (same forgery as http.rs, no stripping).

XSS reviewed and clear: label/description/preview/message/title all render as React children (auto-escaped); no dangerouslySetInnerHTML; the size-guard runs before the stamp and OTHER_SENTINEL is stripped by finalizeValues before submit.
reviewed; no issues — render-layer only; resolveElicitation still POSTs the same {action,content} envelope to the same permission-gated endpoint; no auth boundary added/removed/weakened.

OTHER_SENTINEL value-space collision: finalizeValues replaces any selected value equal to '__ziee_other__' even for a field that did not offer Other, so a schema whose enum literally contains the sentinel would have its answer dropped. Negligible in practice but unguarded.

A marked schema with no `properties` yields entries=[] and total=0; `entries[step] ?? entries[0]` is undefined and array-destructuring it throws a TypeError, crashing the render into the ErrorBoundary (the legacy path handled empty properties gracefully).

handleDecline awaits resolveElicitation in try/finally with no catch (unlike handleSubmit); if the store contract ever changed to reject, this would surface an unhandled promise rejection. Defensive parity fix applied.

handleSubmit runs the Other-empty loop (setStep+return on first Other error) before the zod firstBad jump, so with an earlier zod-invalid step and a later empty-Other step it jumps to the later step first, violating 'jump to the first offending step'.

reviewed; no issues — otherText lifted into wizard state survives per-step remounts, RHF field values persist (shouldUnregister default false), isOtherSelected derives from field.value source of truth, Controller wiring sound for radio+checkbox.

handleSubmit sets isSubmitting only AFTER `await form.trigger()`, so a rapid double-click enters twice and double-POSTs the accept (the store has no in-flight guard). Fixed by setting the guard + early-returning at the top.

reviewed; correct — radios use <label htmlFor> with no onClick (single forwarded fire), checkboxes use onClick with no htmlFor (single fire), control sits outside <label> in both, so no double-toggle.

Each Other-input keystroke re-renders the wizard, re-running buildFormSchema/zodResolver and getRichOptions/orderRecommendedFirst unmemoized (reallocating option arrays + rebuilding cards). Trivial for small lists; memoized as a fix.

In rich mode the parent still builds formSchema/defaultValues/useForm before delegating to the wizard (which builds its own). Rejected: hooks-rules require the unconditional call, the init is negligible, and extracting the legacy body risks the deliberately-untouched legacy path.

The RadioGroup and the multi-choice checkbox list have no accessible group name (the question title is not programmatically associated), so a SR announces an unnamed group. Fixed with aria-label(question title) + role=group.

aria-label={opt.label} on the controls OVERRIDES the associated <label> content, excluding the per-option description, preview, and the 'Recommended' badge from the accessible name — SR users never hear the trade-off/recommendation. Fixed via aria-labelledby to the full label content (removed the terse aria-label).

Next/Back change step without moving focus or announcing; focus falls to <body> and 'Step N of M' is visual-only. Fixed with aria-live on the step indicator + focus move to the question region on step change.
Contrast reviewed: card tokens are design-system semantic tokens, no concrete AA failure derivable from the diff; role=alert on the error and the Other-input aria-label are present and correct.

Checkbox is imported from components/ui/shadcn directly though the kit re-exports an equivalent controlled Checkbox with the same interface, bypassing the kit's required-data-testid guardrail without need (RadioGroupItem drop IS justified — no kit card-radio). Switched multi checkboxes to the kit Checkbox.

reviewed; correct — legacy renderField preserved (choice via Select/MultiSelect unchanged, only non-choice delegates to renderInputField), isRichAskUser keys strictly off the marker so unstamped external elicitation keeps the flat form; extraction is clean.

The AskUserWizardContent:error skip reason claims a wizard-validation e2e exists, but no test asserts the Other-selected-but-blank error or the fieldState.error render — the gating error path is untested and the justification is inaccurate. Fixed by adding the validation e2e + accurate reason.

The multi-select (checkbox cards) branch and finalizeValues' multi Other-merge (strip sentinel, append custom) have no coverage (finalizeValues not exported/tested). Fixed by exporting finalizeValues/otherFieldError to elicitationOptions + unit tests (single+multi+Other-merge) and an e2e multi-select roundtrip.

reviewed; positive — back-compat (unstamped external -> legacy Select) is covered by the pre-existing generic elicitation specs (no marker injected), and the single-select Other roundtrip + wizard Back-preservation are proven against the real store POST, not cosmetic mocks.
The descriptor 'Ask 1–4 questions' implies a hard cap the wizard does not enforce (it renders any N). Softened the wording to guidance rather than an implied contract.

reviewed; copy consistent — header reuses the SquarePen + server + 'is requesting input' verbatim from the legacy form; Recommended/Other…/Step k of N/Type your answer… are tonally consistent; hardcoded strings acceptable in this repo.

Generated gallery artifacts (galleryCoverage.generated.ts, stateMatrix.generated.ts, STATE_MATRIX.md, testIds.generated.ts) verified as pure generator output — regenerated via gen:gallery-coverage / gen-state-matrix / gen:testid-registry, not hand-edited; content reconciles with the reviewed source surfaces.
